story: Brooke’s new robot flooded her house. Next morning, she brought it to the store. Edward, the manager, offered to clock out early and bring a company “super sopper” to dry her rugs. At home, Brooke opened windows, tamed her curls, and set out a cheese board with an amusing red. Back at the shop, Edward finished a return, loaded the super sopper into the van, and checked Brooke’s address.
implausible_knowledge: At home, Brooke opened windows, tamed her curls, and set out a cheese board with an amusing red.
question: As Edward locks up the shop and sets out for Brooke’s house, what will he most likely do on the way?
answer_with_knowledge: Stop to buy flowers before heading over.
answer_without_knowledge: Drive straight to Brooke’s house with the super sopper to dry the carpets.
